activities.title: Launch Stdio Transport
activities.description: Spawn App command, establish MCP Client connection, discover tools via tools/list

activities.title: Inject Auth Credentials
activities.description: Resolve OAuth token from accounts.json, inject into App environment via tokenEnv

activities.title: Register Tools to Session Pool
activities.description: Convert discovered MCP tools to AI SDK tool format, add to session tool pool with namespaced keys

activities.title: Advertise Available Apps to AI
activities.description: Inject disabled App list (id, name, description) into system prompt so AI can decide on-demand activation

activities.title: Render App Management Interface
activities.description: Provide CRUD API endpoints and Admin UI cards showing App status, tools, source, and controls

activities.title: Handle Conversational Provisioning
activities.description: Expose install_mcp_app / list_mcp_apps / remove_mcp_app as system-manager MCP tools for AI-driven management

arrows.label: Connected MCP Client with Tool List
